ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lcia_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow */,
  "flow_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the flow */,
  "flow_name" TEXT /* Name of the flow */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the flow belongs to */,
  "flow_type" TEXT /* Type of the flow (e.g., input, output) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flow was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flow was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flows_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES lcia_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the flow property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flow property */,
  "property_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., country, region, city) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact factor */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow the factor is associated with */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow property */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the impact factor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the factor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the factor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES flow_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_factors_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES flow_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., government, academic, industry) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow the data is associated with */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow property */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data entry */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES flow_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES flow_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the quality metric is associated with */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_category_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow-category mapping */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_category_maps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES lcia_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_category_maps_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flow_property_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow-property mapping */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_property_maps_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES flow_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flow_property_maps_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_flow_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location-flow mapping */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flow */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_flow_maps_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("flow_id") REFERENCES flows ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_flow_maps_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
